content:
Everyone suddenly became an AI expert.
People throw around words like:
“Agents.”
“Reasoning.”
“Context.”
“Fine-tuning.”
“Multi-modal.”
Half the room nods.
The other half secretly opens Google after the meeting.
But here’s the funny thing:
You don’t actually need to understand hundreds of AI terms.
You only need a few core ideas.
Because underneath all the hype, almost every AI system is following a handful of simple rules.
Understand these, and AI stops feeling like magic.
Let’s begin.
1. AI Doesn’t “Know” Things
It Predicts Things
This is the biggest misunderstanding on the internet.
People imagine AI like a genius sitting inside a computer with a giant encyclopedia.
